name: pathway
description: Pathway Design System skills for Ministry Brands Amplify designers and developers. Five skills that cover the full component lifecycle: Component Readiness (audits a Figma component against the Pathway handoff checklist), Component Spec Maker (drafts a component spec from Figma), Spec Review (audits a spec against system-wide rules and resolves conflicts), Component Pipeline (ships a component from Figma to Storybook to GitHub), and Tokens Sync (syncs design tokens from Figma into the repo and Storybook). The first three are safe for any designer; the last two write to the design system repo and are intended for the DS owner.
